description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex roofline featuring multiple gables and dormers. The front facade includes a double garage, a main entryway with an arched doorway, and several large windows, all framed by manicured landscaping and a short driveway. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes both front and back yards, with the backyard featuring a patio area and a small pool. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, contrasted by darker roofing and window trims. The house is surrounded by trees and shrubs, adding to its residential and inviting appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional architectural elements, suitable for a family home in an upscale neighborhood.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, double garage, landscaped yards, and a mix of modern and traditional design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with arched door, and landscaped front yard with driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and dense shrubbery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a patio area, and a small pool in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, side yard, and more landscaping along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows and some grouped sets
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door with a small covered porch, flanked by windows and landscaped steps
